title: Fundamental Principles of Counting Decision Flowchart
description: A flowchart that guides the user in selecting the appropriate counting principle (Addition or Multiplication) based on the nature of the problem, with examples of each.
elements: Decision: Are the tasks/choices independent and sequential?
Example: Travel options (Route A OR Route B)
relationships: Decision branch 'Yes' leads to Multiplication Principle
Decision branch 'No' leads to Addition Principle
Multiplication Principle leads to its Example
Addition Principle leads to its Example
Both Example nodes lead to Result
